consumer_electronics.title: Amazon is ending support for older Kindles and Kindle Fires
consumer_electronics.summary: Amazon has announced that starting on May 20th, 2026, Kindle e-readers and Kindle Fire devices released in 2012 and earlier will "no longer be able to purchase, borrow, or download new content via the Kindle Store," Amazon spokesperson Jackie Burke wrote in an email to The Verge. consumer_electronics.summary: On Tuesday, Spotify expanded its Prompted Playlists feature to include podcasts, an update that could make it easier for Premium users to find new shows to listen to. channel_news.summary: The application of artificial intelligence as a customer-facing element of physical stores is far from one-size-fits-all. AI use cases for in-store shopping, in discovery, research and checkout, still vary as brands are trying to figure out what consumers want from AI.

channel_news.title: The RealReal CMO Samantha McCandless on resale math, vintage Bulgari and her go-to sneakers
channel_news.summary: In the latest installment of "What's in Your Cart," The RealReal's Chief Merchandising Officer, Samantha McCandless, shares her personal shopping habits with Modern Retail, including her resale shopping strategy.

channel_news.title: The Unilever-McCormick deal ushers in a new era for condiments
channel_news.summary: The merger between McCormick and the food division of Unilever highlights the never-ending demand for condiments and spices among Americans. Despite consolidation, the category is expected to continue seeing innovation from the food startup and private label players.

channel_news.title: Modern Retail Podcast: Why shoppers can’t get enough of limited-edition scents and flavors
channel_news.summary: CPG brands are increasingly using limited-edition flavors and scents (LTOs) to drive sales and attract new customers. On this week's episode of the Modern Retail Podcast, Dude Wipes talks about how seasonal LTOs have become a big sales driver for them.

channel_news.title: In 2026, AI talk at retail events shifts to proving real results, defining a true strategy
channel_news.summary: At this year's Shoptalk Spring, it wasn't enough for brands and retailers to talk about the ways that they think they will use AI. Now, the pressure is on for everyone to prove how they are using AI to increase output and drive sales.

channel_news.title: Amazon to issue 3.5% surcharge on fulfillment services as fuel, logistics costs rise
channel_news.summary: Amazon will impose a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge on merchants’ fulfillment fees beginning April 17, as rising fuel costs tied to conflict in the Middle East pressure supply chains.

channel_news.title: Marketplace Briefing: Amazon picks up speed in rural America with $4 billion delivery push
channel_news.summary: Amazon shoppers in far-flung U.S. towns are getting their packages faster as the company pushes deeper into rural America.

channel_news.title: FedEx goes after DoorDash, Amazon, UPS with same-day delivery
channel_news.summary: FedEx has now entered the same ring as many other companies trying to win on same-day delivery.
